items.title: Solana ETF demand is surging, but a $1B SOL problem may be brewing – Details
items.whyYouShouldCare: Rising ETF demand could enhance SOL's market visibility, but the looming $1B issue may impact liquidity and investor confidence.

items.title: It’s a ‘new era’ for crypto users who ‘trade anything and everything’ as Jito goes consumer, CEO Bruder says
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's shift to consumer trading could broaden Solana's user base, potentially increasing ecosystem activity and transaction volume.

items.title: Crypto longs lose $500 million as bitcoin slides to $78,000, SOL and XRP down 5%
items.whyYouShouldCare: The recent decline in crypto prices, including SOL, highlights market volatility, which may affect investor sentiment and trading strategies.
